message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceDiagram

participant HealthCloud
participant Embedded Browser
participant Apigee Edge
participant Orion Health Platform

note right of HealthCloud
OAuth2 Authorization Code Grant Workflow
with SAML2 Post Binding for user provisioning
end note

HealthCloud ->> Embedded Browser: GET /authorize?response_type=code
Embedded Browser ->> Apigee Edge: 302 https://<redirect_url> (SAML OR token)

note right of Apigee Edge
SAML Authentication
end note

Embedded Browser ->> Apigee Edge: POST /oauth2/saml
Apigee Edge ->> Orion Health Platform: POST /login-auth/saml?path=/actor/current
Orion Health Platform ->> Apigee Edge: Verify SAMLResponse
Apigee Edge ->> Orion Health Platform: Generate authorization code
Orion Health Platform ->> Apigee Edge: 302 https://<redirect_url>?code=<code>

Apigee Edge ->> Embedded Browser: POST /token?code=<code>
Embedded Browser ->> HealthCloud: 200 access_token + refresh_token

@enduml
